basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA), Ministry of Civil Aviation
basic_details.short_information: IGRUA is recruiting 1 Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) post with Post-Graduate qualification and aviation experience, last date 20 July 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 65 years as on 01.06.2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per Government of India rules (if any).

qualification.details: Ph.D. in Aviation Science, Aviation Law, Transport Management, or related discipline. Published research papers/articles on aviation regulations or safety management. DGCA examination setting/moderation experience.
qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University.
qualification.experience: Minimum 05 years teaching/instructional experience in aviation-related subjects at DGCA approved Flying Training Organisations, Defence Aviation Training Establishments, Universities/Colleges offering aviation programmes, or AAI training centres.

vacancy_details.details: A total of 01 post has been announced for Ground Instructor (Air Regulations). The appointment is purely contractual for 11 months and extendible based on performance and requirement.

how_to_apply: Candidates must submit applications only through email to career[at]igrua[dot]gov[dot]in. Attach CV and self-attested copies of certificates in a single PDF file (CV first, then educational certificates from 10th onward, followed by experience certificates). Mention the subject line exactly as: “APPLICATION - GROUND INSTRUCTOR (AIR REGULATIONS) IGRUA/ADVT/20/2026”.
Applications without required self-attested documents will be rejected.
important_instructions: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for written test/interview (online mode). Mere submission of application does not guarantee selection. The appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Appointment subject to document verification and medical fitness. Jurisdiction for any disputes: Courts in Lucknow only.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 01 post has been announced for Ground Instructor (Air Regulations). The appointment is purely contractual for 11 months and extendible based on performance and requirement.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions. Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply.

rows.details: Post-Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University.

Held or holding CPL/ATPL; OR Air Traffic Controller from AAI/Defence Forces; OR Minimum 10 years professional experience in civil aviation regulatory domain, airline operations, or aviation safety management.

Minimum 05 years teaching/instructional experience in aviation-related subjects at DGCA approved Flying Training Organisations, Defence Aviation Training Establishments, Universities/Colleges offering aviation programmes, or AAI training centres.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Desirable Qualifications
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Aviation Science, Aviation Law, Transport Management, or related discipline. Published research papers/articles on aviation regulations or safety management. DGCA examination setting/moderation experience.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 65 years as on 01.06.2026. Age relaxation may be applicable as per Government of India rules (if any).

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Key Responsibilities
content_sections.text: Deliver theoretical training on Air Regulations, Rules of the Air, Licensing Requirements, Flight Rules, and ICAO Annexes. Prepare lesson plans, training materials, and question banks as per DGCA CARs. Conduct internal assessments and assist in DGCA exam preparation. Maintain training records, student performance reports, and compliance documentation. Update course content with latest DGCA/ICAO regulatory changes. Coordinate with Chief Ground Instructor and Flight Instructors for integrated training. Ensure adherence to IGRUA standards of training, discipline, and safety.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Why Join IGRUA?
content_sections.text: Peaceful work life in one of India’s most serene aviation campuses. Healthy, safe, and family-friendly environment with low cost of living in Amethi. Quarters/Accommodation provided subject to availability. Opportunity to contribute to India’s leading pilot training institute. Ideal role for Ex-Servicemen seeking disciplined yet balanced lifestyle.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit applications only through email to career[at]igrua[dot]gov[dot]in. Attach CV and self-attested copies of certificates in a single PDF file (CV first, then educational certificates from 10th onward, followed by experience certificates). Mention the subject line exactly as: “APPLICATION - GROUND INSTRUCTOR (AIR REGULATIONS) IGRUA/ADVT/20/2026”. Applications without required self-attested documents will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for written test/interview (online mode). Mere submission of application does not guarantee selection. The appointment is purely contractual and does not confer any right for regular absorption. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Appointment subject to document verification and medical fitness. Jurisdiction for any disputes: Courts in Lucknow only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IGRUA Ground Instructor (Air Regulations) 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Ground Instructor at IGRUA?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will receive fixed remuneration of Rs. 1,65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for IGRUA Ground Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age is 65 years as on 01.06.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications for Ground Instructor (Air Regulations)?
faq.answer: Post-Graduate degree + CPL/ATPL or equivalent aviation experience (10 years) + minimum 5 years teaching experience in aviation subjects.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IGRUA Amethi Ground Instructor post?
faq.answer: Send application with CV and self-attested documents in single PDF to [email protected] with proper subject line before the deadline

faq.question: Q6. Is the IGRUA Ground Instructor post permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely contractual for 11 months and extendible as per requirement. It does not lead to regular absorption.

faq.question: Q7. Who can apply for IGRUA Ground Instructor (Air Regulations)?
faq.answer: Indian Nationals with required Post-Graduate qualification, aviation licence/experience, and minimum 5 years teaching experience in relevant field.
